metrics.title: HOSPITAL CORE | Management System
metrics.bodyTextPreview: HOSPITAL CORE Clinical Suite Empowering your clinical workflow. Everything you need for patient care, all in one place. Manage Schedule View and manage your daily appointments and schedule. Patient Records Access patient medical records securely and efficientl

reasons: cleared staff session and redirected to /staff/login

manualFindings.requirement: Either support the public department slug route or update smoke/navigation evidence to use a seeded department UUID. Current live render shows Invalid request parameter from /api/v1/departments/cardiology.
Replace placeholder id 1 with a seeded lab-result UUID/detail id for live screenshot and release evidence, or add a resolver/404 UX that does not surface raw backend parameter errors.
Replace placeholder appointment id 1 with a seeded appointment UUID for live browser evidence. Current live API request /api/v1/appointments/1 returns 400.
Replace placeholder admin user id 1 with a seeded user UUID/detail id, or provide a professional not-found/error state instead of an empty Staff Directory page with raw Invalid request parameter.
When authenticated as admin, avoid rendering the page title as Doctor Dashboard with a physician ID. The shell says Admin Ops, but the page content reads doctor-specific.
Rename or restructure the page title/content so Admin Support does not present as Queue Board. Current screenshot is usable but mismatched to route intent.

These public legal/security screens are readable but very sparse. Add scannable sections for data use, retention, patient rights, security controls, and contact/escalation paths before public launch polish.
Keep full-page screenshots, contact sheets, and manifest tied to the route matrix so future implementation can verify exact before/after changes without updating visual baselines blindly.
